## Summary

Brief description of the change and why it's needed.

## SnapDrift Impact

Call out any changes to config defaults, artifact layout, generated report wording, or action metadata.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## Unreleased`
- [ ] SnapDrift naming and public copy stay internally consistent
